live_matches.match_title: Bayern vs PSG - Semi-Final - Leg 2 - 6 May 2026
live_matches.description: Bayern Munich and Paris Saint‑Germain meet again in the decisive second leg following an unforgettable opener that saw PSG edge a 5-4 thriller. With Bayern needing to overturn the deficit and PSG focused on defending a narrow advantage, the return fixture is set to deliver relentless pressure, bold attacking moves, and classic Champions League drama on the path to the final. Who will emerge victorious and reach the final? Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
